response.justification: Bogdan brings over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tools like Docker and AWS CDK, directly aligning with the required stack. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks (including custom test runners), and cross-platform development demonstrates strong architectural and problem-solving skills. His open-source contributions and technical teaching further indicate leadership and communication strengths.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple enterprises
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and internal tooling, including MCP code generators
Strong DevOps and infrastructure background with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and cloud platforms
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent tools (Node.js, custom test runners) are present
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
Some roles use DLang or Ember.js heavily; may require adjustment to modern React/Nest.js ecosystem
